case_title: MARJORIE DEGROOT VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DEGROOT, MARJORIE AS TO DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN PEKAREK--RISK MGMT, UCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEGROOT, MARJORIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
